# Shivraj Enterprise

> Manpower supply and housekeeping services across Vapi GIDC and surrounding villages in Valsad District, Gujarat. Skilled, semi-skilled and unskilled labour for engineering, pharmaceutical, chemical and packaging industries.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of services, presence, and why choose Shivraj Enterprise.
- [About](/#/about): Company background, experience, and core values.
- [Services](/#/services): Manpower outsourcing, housekeeping, auxiliary services and rate card.
- [Contact](/#/contact): Phone, email, address and inquiry form.
- [Terms](/#/terms): Terms and conditions for engagement.
